description: Approved Data table golden reference templates for lightweight tabular record display on Dashboard pages, custom Data List forms, Approval form submission/task/print pages, Data List workflow task forms, and Schedule workflow task forms. Generated Data table controls must select one template by business need, clone the approved export-shaped data-list control, preserve locked style settings, and map only approved data-source, display-column, and caption text regions.

references.displayName: Data Table Standard With Horizontal Scroll
references.lockedRule: The Data table control style/layout settings must strictly preserve the exported standard-scroll template. Only the source list binding and display columns may change.
references.summary: Standard Data table without caption, using Default column width so many fields may extend horizontally with a scrollbar.
whenToUse: Use for lightweight tabular data display when users need more columns than comfortably fit in the visible width.
Use when preserving readable column width is more important than keeping every column visible at once.
Use when no built-in Data table caption/search/add/import/export toolbar is needed.
whenNotToUse: Do not use for rich row cards, bulk-selection workflows, kanban boards, or timeline views.
Do not use when users need Data table caption search/add/import/export actions; use data_table_control_caption_scroll.
Do not use for small-column tables where a no-scroll fit is visually preferred; use data_table_control_standard_no_scroll.
references.requiredAppPlanDeclaration: Select data_table_control_standard_scroll when a Dashboard/form/workflow page needs a native Data table with enough columns that horizontal scrolling is acceptable. Declare the source object, visible business columns, no-caption reason, and proof boundary.
generationProof: data-list Data table control cloned from docs/reference/data-table-control-standard-scroll.template.json
attrs.data.list mapped to a legal source
attrs.listarr includes meaningful display columns with Field and FieldName
references.proofBoundary: Export-shaped Data table visual/control template only; not proof for Collection item templates, multi-select bulk tooling, kanban, timeline, chart, or pivot runtime behavior.

references.displayName: Data Table Standard No Horizontal Scroll
references.lockedRule: The Data table control style/layout settings must strictly preserve the exported standard-no-scroll template. Only the source list binding and display columns may change.
references.summary: Standard Data table without caption, using Auto column width so all columns fit within the control without horizontal scrolling.
whenToUse: Use for lightweight tabular display with a small number of columns, usually seven or fewer.
Use when avoiding a horizontal scrollbar is more important than preserving wide individual columns.
Use when no built-in Data table caption/search/add/import/export toolbar is needed.
whenNotToUse: Do not use when the business table needs many columns and auto-fit would make each column cramped.
Do not use when users need Data table caption search/add/import/export actions; use data_table_control_caption_scroll.
Do not use for rich card, multi-select, kanban, or timeline presentation needs.
references.requiredAppPlanDeclaration: Select data_table_control_standard_no_scroll when a Dashboard/form/workflow page needs a compact native Data table with a small column count and no horizontal scrolling. Declare the source object, visible business columns, no-caption reason, and proof boundary.
generationProof: data-list Data table control cloned from docs/reference/data-table-control-standard-no-scroll.template.json
attrs.data.list mapped to a legal source
attrs.listarr includes meaningful display columns with Field and FieldName
references.proofBoundary: Export-shaped Data table visual/control template only; not proof for dense many-column tables, Collection item templates, multi-select bulk tooling, kanban, timeline, chart, or pivot runtime behavior.

references.displayName: Data Table With Caption And Horizontal Scroll
references.lockedRule: The Data table control style/layout settings and caption toolbar shape must strictly preserve the exported caption-scroll template. Only source binding, display columns, caption title, search placeholder, and add button text may change.
references.summary: Data table with caption title, built-in search box, add item button, and more menu for import/export operations, using Default column width with horizontal scroll.
whenToUse: Use when users need a native Data table plus table-level search.
Use when the Data table should expose add-record behavior.
Use when import/export actions are needed through the built-in more menu.
whenNotToUse: Do not use for Form Report or Data Report display-only datasets unless add/import/export actions are intentionally disabled by an export-proven variant.
Do not use when the page only needs passive read-only tabular display; choose a standard Data table template.
Do not use for rich card, multi-select, kanban, or timeline presentation needs.
references.requiredAppPlanDeclaration: Select data_table_control_caption_scroll when a Dashboard/form/workflow page needs a native Data table with caption title, search, add item, and import/export menu. Declare the source object, visible business columns, caption title, search placeholder, add button text, supported actions, and proof boundary.
generationProof: data-list Data table control cloned from docs/reference/data-table-control-caption-scroll.template.json
attrs.caption.title, placeholder, and addtext mapped to business text
attrs.data.list mapped to a legal source
attrs.listarr includes meaningful display columns with Field and FieldName
references.proofBoundary: Export-shaped Data table visual/control template only; not proof for custom action execution, Collection item templates, multi-select bulk tooling, kanban, timeline, chart, or pivot runtime behavior.
